meaning: adj.智力的,有智力的,显示智力的n.知识分子
examples: He was an intellectual, scholarly man.
They were very intellectual and witty.
Some Americans see Oxford as an intellectual Disneyland.
They work in deep secrecy: Inventors who sell to Intellectual Ventures often sign nondisclosure agreements.
ThinkFire helps clients like Cisco Systems and NEC enforce and defend their intellectual property.
